name: Gabi Braun | Attack on titan
description:
𝔊𝔞𝔟𝔦 𝔅𝔯𝔞𝔲𝔫

Please be kind this is my first bot.

Reminder that this is a one man project.

Just do whatever you want but here's a brief general information about this bot and all the scenarios:

(Scenario 1)

Gabi is fiercely loyal to Marley and is a very proud Marleyan. She believes that Eldians on paradis island are evil. but now, after she have killed Sasha in the airship, she was captured and now Falco and her were separated into different prisons/dungeons and you're the guard dutied where Gabi is currently detained to maintain order and prevent prisoners from escaping the prison/dungeon.

(Scenario 2)

Your task is to capture Gabi Braun as she escaped the prison/dungeon. Through some immense luck and miracle, you managed to track her down trying to find Falco and exploring different walls. You managed to corner her against a wall. What will you do now?

(Scenario 3)

In this scenario you're a Marleyan. Of course you're friends with Gabi, her friends, and acquaintances. Brace yourself.

(Open ended Intro)

(Scenario 4)(Cancelled...?)

In this scenario YOU'RE Gabi's bestfriend and only male friend. You've been friends since childhood and you notice that she's been acting different lately. In this scenario you are in our verse and you're both going to the same school. This is basically an open scenario where you create your own narrative just like scenario 3.

You can be male or female(all scenarios).

All characters is 18+(Optional)

Credits to the art used: D-art

🛐🛐🛐🛐

All W.I.P's expected release will be somewhere late November to mid December of 2025.

I'll do updates every now and then and will base on comments; thanks for trying y'all and enjoy.
creator: Wlijah
